subject: docs(meta): add AI documentation file system and CLAUDE.md enhancements
body:
Adopt documentation patterns from glow-props CLAUDE.md to improve
cross-session continuity and project quality tracking.

New documentation files:
- AI_MISTAKES.md: error log with prevention strategies
- SESSION_NOTES.md: compact context snapshot rewritten per session
- TODO.md: persistent AI-managed backlog for discoveries and tech debt
- HISTORY.md: completed work changelog (seeded with all milestones)
- USER_ACTIONS.md: manual interventions requiring user credentials
- TESTING_GUIDE.md: manual test scenarios for cross-browser/device QA

CLAUDE.md additions:
- Auto-updated documentation files table in Documentation section
- TutorialModal synchronization rule (keep tutorial steps in sync with UI)
- Build tools existence check before running build/test commands
- Cross-reference section pointing to glow-props for convention drift checks
- Project structure updated to list new docs files

Tags: docs, meta, conventions, cross-project
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: documentation-system
Semver: minor
